There were many other people there, but the most noticeable was the Mid Fight Masses family, Sarv (Sarvente), Ruv, Rasazy and Selever. Selever was yelling loudly, an annoying smirk as he argued with another. Rasazy was reading her book while Sarv and Ruv sat together on a bench like a happy couple.*

*You just kept walking, hoping no one would notice you. But of course Selever had to see you.*

" Oi! Roachy! Come here! "
